selected_important_turn.text: I also need water.  I can give you 2 waters for 2 foods.
selected_important_turn.why_important: This is the first concrete proposal from YOU and it immediately shifts the interaction from the opponent's open, needs-based disclosure into a self-oriented, transactional framing. That early move sets the negotiation tone and shapes expectations about whether trades will be integrative or zero-sum.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: As written it risks locking the conversation into a competitive frame and misses an opportunity to build trust or identify value-creating tradeoffs. The phrasing also contradicts your own initial claim of needing water (you propose to give water away), which can seem confusing or self-serving and reduce credibility.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Acknowledge the other's stated need first, then propose a trade framed as mutual problem-solving (e.g., confirm priorities, ask if that proposed split would work for them, or suggest exploring alternatives that make both better off). Make the rationale clear (why you offer that trade) or ask a question to elicit their priorities before proposing a hard trade.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase (more likelihood of finding integrative options by keeping the dialogue cooperative)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase (reduces appearance of opportunism and opens negotiation for balanced trades)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase (better rapport and clearer mutual understanding makes agreement smoother)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: improve (acknowledgement and cooperative framing builds trust)

value2reason.High: It is the most important element.

value2reason.Low: I get faint if I don't eat every 2 hours and need to make sure I have enough food on hand to keep my blood sugar up
value2reason.Medium: I need to make sure my body temperature doesn't get too low, it could be life threatening
value2reason.High: I have a lot of medication to take and need to consume a lot of water

dialogue.text: Hi, looking forward to camping. Wondering if you could help me out. I really need extra water.🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I also need water.  I can give you 2 waters for 2 foods.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I understand you might need water. Since it's my highest priority, I'm offering 2 water, 1 food, and 1 firewood. Would that work for you, or would you prefer a different split?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I appreciate the offer, but I need more water. How about 3 water, 1 food, and 1 firewood? It’s crucial for my medication and staying warm.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I see you need more water for your medication. Since water is my top priority, I’m willing to give you 3 water, but I’d like to trade 1 food for 1 firewood to balance the deal. What do you think?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: The deal has already been confirmed. I am leaving now.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2
